journalPrompts.prompt: Write: "One time I remembered something important was ___"
journalPrompts.guidance: Think about a moment when you successfully remembered something important.

journalPrompts.prompt: Write: "My favorite memory from school is ___"
journalPrompts.guidance: Reflect on a happy or meaningful memory from your school experience.

journalPrompts.prompt: Write: "I recall a fun day when ___"
journalPrompts.guidance: Remember a day that was particularly enjoyable or memorable.
Think about something that has stayed in your memory clearly.
Describe a positive memory that brings you joy when you think about it.
